sessions.note: 承接 W4 partial 读侧统一收尾

intent: 退役 Fabric co-location agents.meta 读侧统一收尾 — 承接 W4 partial(counter 侧 + G-GUARD 已交付)。store migrate 22 条 + ~18 readAgentsMeta 消费者改读 store + install 不 scaffold + 收口全绿。
goal: agents.meta.json co-location 模型彻底退役: 团队 KB 迁入 team store(152a5f20), ~18 个生产消费者读 store 而非 co-location agents.meta, install 不再 scaffold agents.meta+空柜, shared rebuild + 全量 tsc --noEmit + 全测试 0 fail + 旧柜删净。store-only 无分叉。
push_policy: G-GREEN 全绿后再推远端(用户决策待确认; 默认绿后推)

in_scope: store migrate 本 repo .fabric/knowledge 22 条 committed(+12 pending) → team store

~18 个 readAgentsMeta 生产消费者改读 store(plan-context/load-active-meta/buildKnowledgeMeta/knowledge-sections/get-knowledge/extract-knowledge/doctor inspectMeta+index-drift+counter-reconcile/cache meta watch/MCP tools)
agents.meta.json 零生产读者(测试/schema 定义除外)
install 不再 scaffold .fabric/agents.meta.json + 空 knowledge 柜(保留 AGENTS.md/fabric-config.json bootstrap)
读侧 fixture 从 co-location 迁 store
收口: shared rebuild + 全量 tsc --noEmit 绿 + 全测试 0 fail + 删旧柜验证
out_of_scope: 写侧(已 store-only, cross-store-write 已 cutover)
counter 子系统(W4 已交付: per-store counters.json)
G-GUARD scope lint / re-scope / promote(W4-A6/A7 已交付)
review backlog 12 条 pending 审核(用户另起 /fabric-review)
KT-DEC-0004/KT-DEC-0003 知识正文 drift 更新(收口后 follow-up)
推远端(待 G-GREEN 后单独决策)
constraints: clean-slate: 不保留 co-location fallback shim(KT-DEC-0002)
stable_id 单调不变量: 迁移保留原 id, counters.json seed 防撞号(KT-DEC-0004, W4-F1)
改 packages/shared/src/schemas 后必须 rebuild dist
本地 tsc --noEmit 全量(不光 build), 防 CI tsc 漂移

ship_criteria.name: G-MIGRATE-DOGFOOD
ship_criteria.target: 22 条 committed 迁入 team store + recall 实际命中迁入条目
ship_criteria.actual: 34 条(22 committed + 12 pending)迁入 team store 152a5f20; counters.json seed KT.DEC=9004/GLD=4/PIT=9105 防撞号; fab_recall round-trip 返回 body path=~/.fabric/stores/152a5f20/.../KT-DEC-0001.md store.alias=team
ship_criteria.verifier_cmd: fabric store migrate (落盘) + reconcileStoreCounters auto-seed 验证 + fab_recall round-trip 命中检查

ship_criteria.name: G-DECOLO-READ
ship_criteria.target: ~18 readAgentsMeta 生产消费者零 co-location 读(测试/schema 除外)
ship_criteria.verifier_cmd: PROBE: grep -rn 'readAgentsMeta|loadActiveMeta|agents.meta.json' packages/*/src --include=*.ts | grep -v __tests__ | grep -v schemas/agents-meta — 首轮探测确定精确白名单(schema 定义 + counter envelope 复用是合法残留)

ship_criteria.name: G-INSTALL
ship_criteria.target: install 不 scaffold agents.meta.json + 空 knowledge 柜; 保留 AGENTS.md/fabric-config.json
ship_criteria.verifier_cmd: PROBE: grep install.ts scaffold agents.meta + install integration test 验证生成物清单

ship_criteria.name: G-GREEN
ship_criteria.target: shared rebuild + 全量 tsc --noEmit 0 err + 全测试 0 fail + 旧柜(.fabric/knowledge + .fabric/agents.meta.json)删净
ship_criteria.verifier_cmd: pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-shared build && pnpm -r exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm -r test && ls .fabric/knowledge .fabric/agents.meta.json 2>&1

task_decomposition.subject: 落盘 store migrate (22 committed + 12 pending → team store 152a5f20)
task_decomposition.done_when: fabric store migrate 落盘成功; .fabric/knowledge 条目迁入 ~/.fabric/stores/152a5f20.../knowledge; counters.json auto-seed(reconcileStoreCounters)

verification.verifier: migrate report + counters.json seed 检查
verification.evidence: 34 条迁入 store; counters.json KT.DEC=9004/GLD=4/PIT=9105; co-location .fabric/knowledge 仅剩 .gitkeep; store 仓库已 commit

task_decomposition.subject: dogfood recall round-trip: 迁入后 fab_recall 实际命中 team store 条目
task_decomposition.done_when: fab_recall(paths) 返回迁入的 KT-DEC/GLD/PIT 条目 body, store.alias=team(非 co-location 路径)

verification.evidence: team:KT-DEC-0001/KT-GLD-0001 body 从 ~/.fabric/stores/152a5f20/ 路径返回, store.alias=team; cross-store-recall 读侧已 store-only

task_decomposition.subject: 新建 store-corpus revision helper(computeReadSetRevision)— over walkReadSetStores (qualifiedId+content sha) 排序哈希
task_decomposition.done_when: shared/cross-store 暴露 revision helper; 替代 meta.revision 用于 BM25 cache key/selection_token 绑定/响应 revision_hash/stale 检测; token round-trip(plan-context emit ↔ get-knowledge-sections validate)两端同源
task_decomposition.note: census 暴露的 R1 前置(承重设计): co-location 空后 meta.revision=sha256(''); 详见 .scratchpad/readside-cutover-map.md 承重设计决策段

task_decomposition.subject: plan-context 去 meta.nodes co-location 源, 只留 cross-store(buildCrossStoreRawItems/BodyIndex 范式)
task_decomposition.done_when: plan-context.ts 不再读 co-location agents.meta nodes; 候选全来自 cross-store on-the-fly 索引

task_decomposition.subject: load-active-meta / buildKnowledgeMeta(knowledge-meta-builder) 退役
task_decomposition.done_when: loadActiveMetaOrStale + buildKnowledgeMeta 无生产消费者; 删除或仅留 counter-envelope shim

task_decomposition.subject: knowledge-sections / get-knowledge / extract-knowledge 读 store(cross-store on-the-fly)
task_decomposition.done_when: 三个 service 不读 co-location agents.meta; 走 cross-store body index

verification.verifier: grep + tsc + 各 service 测试

task_decomposition.subject: doctor 的 inspectMeta / index-drift / counter-reconcile 重定向 per-store(复用 reconcileStoreCounters)
task_decomposition.done_when: doctor 不再 co-location agents.meta reconcile; counter-reconcile/index-drift 走 per-store counters.json; 删 co-location-only check

task_decomposition.subject: cache meta watch 改 store(cache.ts invalidation watch 指向 store knowledge 而非 co-location agents.meta)
task_decomposition.done_when: cache invalidation watch 监 store 路径; co-location agents.meta watch 移除

task_decomposition.subject: MCP tools 读侧确认(review/recall/archive-scan/knowledge-sections/plan-context/extract-knowledge 包装层)+ http-experimental api 读侧
task_decomposition.done_when: MCP tool 包装层 + server-http-exp(api/knowledge,api/ledger,http,api/events,bearer-auth) 无 co-location agents.meta 读

task_decomposition.subject: 读侧 fixture 海量从 co-location 迁 store(测试用例 setup 改建 store knowledge 而非 .fabric/agents.meta+co-location 柜)
task_decomposition.done_when: 受影响测试 fixture 改用 store 布局; 测试全绿

task_decomposition.subject: install 不再 scaffold .fabric/agents.meta.json + 空 knowledge 柜(保留 AGENTS.md/fabric-config.json bootstrap)
task_decomposition.done_when: install.ts 不写 agents.meta + 空柜; install integration test 断言生成物清单不含它们

task_decomposition.subject: agents.meta.json 零生产读者验证(grep census, 测试/schema 定义除外)
task_decomposition.done_when: grep readAgentsMeta/agents.meta.json 生产读者 = 0(仅留 schema 定义 + counter-envelope 复用 + 测试)

task_decomposition.subject: 收口: shared rebuild + 全量 tsc --noEmit + 全测试 0 fail + 删旧柜(.fabric/knowledge + agents.meta.json)验证
task_decomposition.done_when: pnpm --filter shared build 绿 + pnpm -r exec tsc --noEmit 0 err + pnpm -r test 0 fail + .fabric/knowledge & agents.meta.json 不存在

newly_discovered_this_round: R0 store-corpus revision helper — census 暴露的 R1 前置承重设计(co-location 空后 meta.revision=sha256(''), 需 store 派生 revision 保 selection_token round-trip)
